summary: Full end-to-end testing of Born In Flight site completed. All 17 backend pytest assertions and all 9 frontend UI flows pass against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Backend health, programs (9 seeded, pillar filter), testimonials (4 seeded), lead create with EmailStr validation, admin auth (X-Admin-Token + /admin/login), and admin-protected CRUD for programs & testimonials all behave correctly. Frontend hero, navigation, FLIGHT methodology, Framework pillar interactivity, Programs filtering, Contact form (valid + invalid email), Admin login + Leads display, and mobile menu toggle all work as expected.

minor.issue: Returns 200 instead of conventional 201 Created on resource creation (minor REST convention)

issues: When mobile menu is closed and 'SCHEDULE A CONVERSATION' nav CTA is rendered alongside the logo, the top header area can feel slightly cramped on the smallest viewports; consider tightening padding or hiding the CTA below md breakpoint (it appears visible inline on 390px viewport in the screenshot).

action_items: OPTIONAL: Change POST /api/leads success status to 201 to align with REST semantics.
OPTIONAL: On <md viewports, hide the inline 'Schedule a Conversation' nav CTA so it does not visually crowd the logo/hamburger row.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py exposes ADMIN_TOKEN with a hardcoded default 'flight-admin-2026' fallback — fine for MVP but should be enforced via env in production and not committed as a default.
POST /api/leads returns 200; consider 201 for created resources.
All endpoints correctly strip MongoDB _id via projection {'_id': 0} — good.
CORS uses os.environ.get('CORS_ORIGINS', '*').split(',') with wildcard default — acceptable for preview, restrict in prod.
Frontend pages all have comprehensive data-testid coverage (verified across Layout, Framework, Programs, Contact, Admin).
test_credentials: Admin token: flight-admin-2026 (sent as X-Admin-Token header or POST /api/admin/login {token}). /app/memory/test_credentials.md not present — flagging.
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 9 programs and 4 testimonials on startup. Test run added 2 leads (test_user@example.com, leadlist@test.com, playwright_test@example.com) and created+deleted ephemeral TEST_prog_* / TEST_t_* records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py runs cleanly via `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. All 17 tests use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and clean up their own program/testimonial fixtures. Test leads are intentionally left in DB for admin Leads tab visual verification. Frontend has full data-testid coverage; reuse selectors documented in script: nav-link-{about|framework|programs|contact}, pillar-btn-{self|team|organization}, filter-{all|self|team|organization}, contact-{name|email-input|message|submit|success}, admin-{token-input|login-submit|dashboard|tab-leads|tab-programs|tab-testimonials}, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu.
